creator: gerard@seibercom.net
text:
This is a fresh installation of ruby19 on a FreeBSD 8.0/amd64 system. The build fails with this error message at the end:

compiling openssl
cc -I. -I../../.ext/include/amd64-freebsd8 -I../.././include -I../.././ext/openssl -DRUBY_EXTCONF_H=\"extconf.h\" -I/usr/local/include    -fPIC -O2 -pipe -march=athlon64  -fno-strict-aliasing -O2 -g -Wall -Wno-parentheses  -fPIC -oopenssl_missing.o -c openssl_missing.c
cc -I. -I../../.ext/include/amd64-freebsd8 -I../.././include -I../.././ext/openssl -DRUBY_EXTCONF_H=\"extconf.h\" -I/usr/local/include    -fPIC -O2 -pipe -march=athlon64  -fno-strict-aliasing -O2 -g -Wall -Wno-parentheses  -fPIC -oossl.o -c ossl.c
ossl.c:118: error: expected ')' before '*' token
ossl.c:119: error: expected ')' before '*' token
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/lang/ruby19/work/ruby-1.9.1-p376/ext/openssl.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/lang/ruby19/work/ruby-1.9.1-p376.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/lang/ruby19.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/lang/ruby19.

Openssl-1.0.0 is installed from the ports system. I have the following notation in the /etc/make.conf file:

WITH_OPENSSL_PORT=yes

I have updated the ports tree, cleared out /usr/ports/distfiles (twice) and attempted to rebuild the port (twice) with the same results.

A link to the entire build log is available here:

http://pastebin.ca/1866762

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: Just attempt to build the port.
